findings.description: RST-specific `:download:` syntax is preserved literally in the Markdown table cell: `:download:`W11AC0201.jsp<./_source/download/W11AC0201.jsp>`` . This RST directive has no meaning in Markdown/JSON context and will appear as literal noise when an AI reads the knowledge file. The file names are what matter and are present, but the surrounding RST markup should have been stripped.
findings.source_evidence: Source uses RST download directive: `:download:`W11AC0201.jsp<./_source/download/W11AC0201.jsp>`` which is a RST-specific navigation artifact.
